title: Clinic Manager
description:
About the Role:
Do you have a passion for clinical quality, patient safety, and continuous improvement? We’re seeking an Executive for the Clinical Quality Management Unit in the Hospital Settings, to lead initiatives that make a real impact on patient care. Work closely with a collaborative team to ensure compliance, drive improvement, and champion infection prevention.

What You’ll Do:

  • Lead clinical quality initiatives, incident reviews, audits, and patient safety reporting.

  • Support licensing inspections and maintain regulatory compliance.

  • Develop and update clinical policies, guidelines, and work instructions.

  • Conduct quality improvement projects and training sessions for staff.

  • Coordinate infection prevention and control programs, including audits and vaccinations.

  • Provide administrative support for committees and meetings.

What We’re Looking For:

  • Bachelor’s degree, preferably in nursing or healthcare-related discipline.

  • Experience in quality management, audits, and clinical compliance; licensing experience is a plus.

  • Strong analytical, reporting, and communication skills.

  • Competent in MS Office and basic data/statistical analysis.

  • Team player with strong organizational, problem-solving, and training skills.

Why Join Us:
Take your expertise to the next level, lead initiatives that improve patient outcomes, and be part of a team that values excellence in healthcare quality and safety.

Kindly email your resume in a detailed Word format to: enoch.cheong@peopleprofilers.com

Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

People Profilers Pte Ltd

Address: 20 Cecil Street, #08-09, Plus Building, Singapore 049705

Contact: +65 6950 9740

EA License No.: 02C4944

EA Personnel Reg. No.: R21100787

EA Personnel: Enoch Cheong

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
